name: Satay Peanut Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 Whole Half Chicken Breasts, Boned And Skinned
8 small Bamboo Skewers, Soaked In Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm the peanut butter to liquefy.
2. Blend all ingredients except the chicken in a food processor or by hand.
3. Reserve 3/4 cup of the peanut sauce for dipping.
4. Cut the chicken into cubes or strips; marinate in the sauce for 1 hour at room temperature or overnight in the refrigerator.
5. Remove the chicken from the marinade; thread onto skewers.
6. Barbecue or broil for 10 to 15 minutes, brushing frequently with the marinade.
7. Serve the satays with the reserved sauce for dipping.
